creator: bhaga@absoludicrous.com
text:
Upgrading port py-bittorrent-core to version 5.3, as that is the latest =
available.  Apologies for the late reply, but I should have a fix =
available within the week.

Once the port has been updated to use BitTorrent-5.3-GPL.tar.gz, we can =
give it another try.  If that does not resolve the situation, I will =
continue to debug.

--
Ben Haga
bhaga at absoludicrous.com=
